503.description: The Health Check is not successful

info.title: Componi API
info.description: HTTP contract for the Componi backend. Realtime (Socket.IO) is documented separately in docs/frontend-integration/realtime.md.

code.description: Source code for the initial version (v1). Capped at 200000 bytes.

dependencies.description: Map of npm package → semver range. Up to 50 entries, 8KB total.

name.description: Override the parent name. Defaults to "<name> (fork)".

reason.description: Private note visible only to the blocker ("why did I block this person?"). Never shown to the blocked user.

details.description: Optional context for the moderator. Capped at 2000 chars.

actionTaken.description: What concrete action was taken. Must match a separate suspend/delete call if needed; this field is for the audit record.

resolutionNote.description: Internal note explaining the decision. Required for audit.

publicReason.description: Optional public reason shown to the reporter (sanitized).

reason.description: Reason for content removal. Stored in audit_logs.

reportId.description: Optional reportId this action resolves (cross-link in audit metadata).

hours.description: Suspension duration in hours. Pass 0 for an indefinite (permanent) ban — admin only. Moderators are capped at 30 days = 720h server-side.

reason.description: Mandatory justification stored in audit_logs and surfaced to the suspended user.

role.description: New role. Admin-only endpoint — guarded by @Roles("admin").

reason.description: Why the role change was made. Required for audit.
